description_long: This object is a pizza inside a partially open cardboard pizza box. The box is primarily red, yellow, and green, with visible branding and text such as 'sketchfab.com/fj0829', 'Satisfaction Guaranteed', and 'PIZZA' on the lid. The pizza itself appears to be a plain cheese pizza with a thin, lightly browned crust and no visible toppings other than cheese. The box is rectangular with a hinged lid, and the pizza fits snugly inside, with a cutout in the front of the box for easy access. The packaging is typical of takeout pizzas, designed for transport and serving in urban environments.
description: A plain cheese pizza in a colorful, branded cardboard pizza box with a partially open lid and visible marketing text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open pizza box with the pizza inside and the 'sketchfab.com/fj0829' text on the front.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid partially open, revealing the pizza and the 'Satisfaction Guaranteed' text on the box side.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed box, displaying the large 'PIZZA' text on the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid partially open, showing the pizza and the 'SMALL/PETIT/PEQUEÑO' text.
